rules.rule: every supportive-image mapping MUST declare role ∈ IMAGE_ROLES.
role-to-section mapping is reviewer-governed; cross-role sharing requires explicit reviewer attribution.
warning role images MUST carry evidence lineage AND a reviewer-approved warning manifest reference.
specification role images MUST cite the specific specification field they support.
comparison-support images MUST list both compared canonical_product_ids.
contextual / orientation images MAY be reused across products only with explicit reviewer-attestation.
